raw_title: Expressive Data: Conceptualizing Political Expression Through Social Media Feeds
title_en: Expressive Data: Conceptualizing Political Expression Through Social Media Feeds
title_zh: 表达性数据：通过社交媒体信息流概念化政治表达
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨如何通过分析社交媒体信息流来理解和定义政治表达。它提出了'表达性数据'的概念，帮助研究者更好地研究人们在社交媒体上的政治言论和行为。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how to understand and define political expression by analyzing social media feeds. It introduces the concept of 'expressive data' to help researchers better study political speech and behavior on social media platforms.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播与数字媒体研究，关注社交媒体数据在理解政治表达和公民参与中的作用。
research_direction_en: Political communication and digital media studies, focusing on the role of social media data in understanding political expression and civic engagement.
